Container.Name: Services-Dashboard
Container.Overview: A dark-themed dashboard for self-hosted services with NPM auto-discovery and PWA support. Automatically discovers services from Nginx Proxy Manager and provides a clean interface to access your self-hosted applications.

Config.Name: Dashboard Port
Config.Description: Port for the main dashboard interface

Config.Name: Admin Panel Port
Config.Description: Port for the admin configuration panel

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Directory where all configuration files are stored (services.json, config.json, auth.json)

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Admin panel username. Leave empty to disable authentication.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Admin panel password. Only used if ADMIN_USERNAME is set.
